revision.comment: Created page with "Draft for a template {{ill|Komonoimi Shrine|ja|小物忌神社}} {{ill|Komonoi Shrine (Sakata City Tobishima)|ja|小物忌神社 (酒田市飛島)}}"
added [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
Adding [[Category:Original pages]][[Category:Most recent 100 pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:mass bump]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
added [[Category:Kk]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
/* Shrines */
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Copying from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]][[Category:Unsorted link categories]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Omonoimi faith]] to [[Template:Omonoimi faith]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Omonoimi faith]] to [[Template:Omonoimi Faith]]
Adding [[Category:bump 1-20]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Omonoimi Faith]] to [[Template:Chokaisan Faith]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Chokaisan Faith]] to [[Template:Omonoimi Faith]] over redirect
Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-20]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:{{subst:PAGENAME}}}}[[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "|小物忌神社|" to "|小物忌神社|1=Komonoimi Shrine|2=ja|3=小物忌神社|"
Text replacement - "Komonoimi Shrine" to "Omonoimi Shrine (Yamadate, Sakata)"
Text replacement - "Komonoi Shrine (Sakata City Tobishima)" to "Omonoimi Shrine (Tobishima, Sakata)"
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category Chokaisan Faith
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
